text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Me? I'm studying for my test<n>tomorrow! Hehe,
aren't I such a hard<n>worker?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: But the thing is, nothing's staying in<n>my head!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I've been staring at my books<n>foreeever, so how
come none of it's<n>sticking?
choice_data_list:
It's easier to remember things if you study to a
rhythm.

It's easier to remember things if you study to a
rhythm.

Try staying motivated by promising yourself a
treat at the end.

Try staying motivated by promising yourself a
treat at the end.

Try staying motivated by promising yourself a

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
What? Really? Wow! That's like a<n>super secret
special trick!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Rhythm, huh? Okay, I'm gonna try<n>dancing while
I study!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
One plus one is... two! Ooh-ah! Ooh-ah!<n>Two plus
two is...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ooh! I love treats! Now I'mgetting excited!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'll have one carrot ice cream<n>once I've
memorized this page! ♪
